news.headline: Shareholders of Quantum Computing Inc. (NASDAQ: QUBT) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky before April 28, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit.
news.summary: Legal firm Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has alerted investors in Quantum Computing Inc. (NASDAQ: QUBT) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recover losses for investors in Quantum Computing Inc. The class action lawsuit has been filed due to declines in the company's stock.

news.headline: Investors in TFI International Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by May 13, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit (NYSE: TFII).
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action lawsuit for investors in TFI International Inc. (NYSE: TFII). The lawsuit aims to help investors recover losses incurred while investing in the Company. The legal firm is seeking compensation for damages suffered by investors in TFI International Inc.

news.headline: Treasury bills auction on 28 Mar 2025 yields successful results.

US stock futures fall after 2-day decline. Tariffs, Fed inflation measure impact. Nasdaq -0.40%, S&P 500 -0.22%, Dow Jones -0.15%, Russell 2000 +0.12%. SPY down to $565.98, QQQ down to $479.89. EU & Canada facing higher tariffs threat. Traders eyeing Fed's interest rates. Most S&P sectors red on Thursday. Mercedes-Benz & Porsche stocks drop. TD Synnex shares fall 14% after earnings report.
news.summary: US stock futures fell after two days of decline, affected by new auto tariffs on foreign cars. President Trump warned of higher tariffs on the EU and Canada if they retaliate. Market focused on inflation data, with core PCE index being a key indicator. 10-year Treasury yield at 4.32%, 2-year at 3.99%. Futures showed: Nasdaq 100 -0.40%, S&P 500 -0.22%, Dow Jones -0.15%, Russell 2000 +0.12%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF dropped in premarket. S&P sectors mostly down on Thursday, with health care and consumer staples up. European automakers suffered losses. TD Synnex Corp. shares fell 14% after earnings report.

news.headline: IHI develops world's first gas-bearing vacuum pump for HLFC, reducing aircraft drag. Tests successful. #innovation #aerodynamics
news.summary: IHI Corporation based in Tokyo has recently achieved a milestone by successfully creating and conducting the first-ever testing of an innovative vacuum pump tailored for hybrid laminar flow control (HLFC) systems. The groundbreaking vacuum pump, incorporating a gas-bearing motor, plays a pivotal role in facilitating HLFC systems. These systems represent cutting-edge aerodynamic control technologies aimed at minimizing aircraft drag in low-pressure air conditions, where air density is approximately one-tenth of that at ground level.

news.headline: Notice has been given for the annual general meeting of Tivoli A/S as per article 8 of the articles of association.
news.summary: Notice is hereby provided for the annual general meeting of Tivoli A/S as per article 8 of the articles of association.

news.headline: Feldspar develops sensor-enabled track 20% more efficient, impressing UK's fastest young athletes in initial tests.
news.summary: Feldspar has achieved a significant milestone by finalizing the initial functional prototype of its sensor-equipped, top-quality track which represents a groundbreaking advancement in sports flooring technology. The track has been tested with some of the swiftest young athletes in the UK, demonstrating a 20% increase in efficiency compared to current models. This development marks an important step forward in enhancing athletic performance and highlights the potential benefits of Feldspar's innovative track.

Economist Peter Schiff criticizes Gamestop's Bitcoin strategy as shares plummet 22% in a day and 26% from the high. Smarter investors are selling off.
news.summary: Prominent economist Peter Schiff criticized GameStop Corp.’s Bitcoin investment approach as the company's stock plummeted. He noted that GME shares dropped by 22% in one day and were down 26% from the previous day's peak. Schiff labeled those who bought into the hype as "fools," pointing out that prudent investors are now leaving the market after realizing that investing in Bitcoin is not a sustainable business strategy. As a result, GameStop has faced significant losses. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Gstar accelerates setting up Indonesian silicon wafer plant with equipment shipment, marking a milestone in PV facility setup.
news.summary: A major achievement has been reached by Gstar in CIKARANG, Indonesia, as they recently sent out their initial shipment of essential equipment for their upcoming photovoltaic production plant. This shipment comprises monocrystalline growth furnaces along with their control systems. This step marks a crucial milestone for Gstar as they prepare to establish their manufacturing facility in Indonesia. The company is gearing up for the installation and operation of this core equipment, indicating progress and development in the renewable energy sector. The successful dispatch of this shipment sets the stage for further advancements in this venture, highlighting the company's dedication to expanding renewable energy infrastructure. With this new equipment in place, Gstar is poised to make a significant impact in the region.

AIM Congress 2025 in Abu Dhabi will host a 3-day AI conference on April 7–9, 2025, uniting global leaders and industry pioneers.
news.summary: Taking place in Abu Dhabi, UAE from April 7 to 9, 2025, AIM Congress 2025, a prominent investment and economic forum, will showcase a dedicated three-day conference on Artificial Intelligence. This event will gather influential figures from various sectors, aiming to discuss the latest advancements in AI technology.

Hexagon Composites ASA released Annual and Sustainability report for 2024 in Oslo, Norway. Board approved.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on March 28, 2025, the Annual and Sustainability report for 2024 of Hexagon Composites ASA was approved by the company's Board of Directors. The report provides insight into the company's performance over the past year. This approval signifies the completion of a comprehensive review of the financial and sustainability aspects of Hexagon Composites ASA. Shareholders and stakeholders can access Hexagon Composites' detailed Annual and Sustainability report 2024 on its website. This report is a vital document showcasing the company's progress and dedication to sustainable practices.

Crypto craze hits San Pedro, Argentina, as 16,000 residents, 20% of town, join exchange. Excitement turns to disappointment.
news.summary: In the town of San Pedro, Argentina, a significant number of 16,000 individuals, which accounts for a fifth of the entire population, participated in a cryptocurrency exchange platform that seemed very promising initially, ensuring benefits for all involved. However, the scenario took a negative turn later on.

news.headline: Vought seeks to slash budget for 'woke' programs, merging fiscal discipline with religious beliefs.
news.summary: Russell T. Vought, the head of the Office of Management and Budget, plans to integrate staunch fiscal conservatism with his Christian beliefs.

news.headline: Automakers face tough decisions amid Trump's 25% car and auto parts tariffs, leading to higher costs.
news.summary: Regardless of their reaction to President Trump's 25 percent tariffs on cars and auto parts, car manufacturers are expected to experience increased costs.

news.headline: RWS's Evolve wins 2 AI Excellence Awards in 2025 for Human-Machine Interaction & Neural Machine Translation. #AI #RWS
news.summary: In CHALFONT ST PETER, England, RWS, a top provider of language and content solutions, has received recognition for its AI solution, Evolve. The tool has claimed victory in two categories at the 2025 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards by the Business Intelligence Group. Evolve excels in Human-Machine Interaction and Neural Machine Translation. This groundbreaking linguistic AI solution from RWS showcases innovative technology, garnering acclaim in these sectors.

Hisense unveils ULED MiniLED U7 Series TV for gamers and sports lovers, promises better images.
news.summary: In Qingdao, China on March 28, 2025, the renowned consumer electronics and home appliances brand, Hisense, introduced its latest U7 Series TV featuring ULED MiniLED technology. Catering to gamers and sports fans, the TV is equipped with MiniLED PRO technology to offer enhanced picture quality with brighter and clearer images.

news.headline: Plane incidents spark worry about infant safety during flights, prompting reevaluation of flying with babies.
news.summary: The safety of young children during flights has come under scrutiny following a series of recent airplane accidents. These incidents have raised concerns among parents and caregivers about the level of protection provided to infants while flying. As a result, many are reassessing their approach to air travel with young children, contemplating if and how they should continue to fly with them.

news.headline: Popular 'brocasters' such as Joe Rogan and Theo Von have large audiences. Trump and Zuckerberg set to appear on Rogan's show.
news.summary: President Trump and Mark Zuckerberg are both set to appear on Joe Rogan's podcast. This popular show has a massive audience, with millions of listeners tuning in regularly. The discussion with Trump and Zuckerberg is expected to generate significant interest and could potentially reach tens of millions of people around the world. Both figures will have the opportunity to share their views and engage in dialogue with Rogan, who has a reputation for hosting in-depth and candid conversations. This move highlights the growing influence of podcasts as a platform for important discussions and debates.

Hong Kong Pharma Digital Technology Holdings reported financial results for 6 months ending on Sep 30, 2024. Symbol: HKPD.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, a Hong Kong-based company called Hong Kong Pharma Digital Technology Holdings Limited, listed on NASDAQ as HKPD, revealed its unaudited financial results. HKPD is a prominent supplier of over the counter (OTC) pharmaceutical products through cross-border e-commerce services in Hong Kong. The company's performance figures were shared without official audit or verification.

US energy storage market hits milestone with CAISO surpassing 13GW grid-scale storage. ERCOT, Midwest, Southeast also growing.
news.summary: In March 28, 2025, it was reported that the energy storage sector in the United States achieved a significant accomplishment in 2024, notably, CAISO exceeded 13 gigawatts (GW) of grid-scale storage capacity. Alongside, regions such as ERCOT are experiencing notable growth in this sector. The Midwest and Southeast regions are also emerging as new areas for potential deployment of energy storage solutions, hinting at further expansion across the country.
